style_direction: Dark sidebar with personal info/skills/education, white main body for narrative experiences
intended_users: Campus and early-career candidates with strong technical skills
locked_layout_rules: A4 portrait, one page, zero print margin
CSS Grid two-column layout (sidebar 58mm dark + main white)
Main body: white with slate/blue accent system
Avatar large and centered in sidebar
Skills displayed as tags with subtle borders
Main content bottom whitespace must not exceed 15%
component_slots: sidebar: avatar, name, tagline, contact, education, skills (tags), qr
main: intro, internship entries, project entries

ai_may_decide: Whether sidebar includes certificates or language ability
Whether to add tools section in sidebar or merge with skills
Section title naming in main body
Whether projects appear as separate section or merged with experience
ai_must_not: Break the two-column grid or overflow sidebar

qa_gates: screenshot: no overlap, clipping, sidebar/main collision
